options.a: Non-binding technical standards, adopted by EASA, to meet the essential requirements of the basic regulation.
options.b: Binding explanatory and interpretation materials on how to achieve the requirements contained in the basic regulation.
options.c: Binding technical standards, adopted by EASA, to meet the essential requirements of the basic regulation.
options.d: Binding special detailed technical specifications determined by the NAA for an aerodrome.
